Source   Edit  

Imports

common

Types

RealtimeClientEvent = ref object
  event_id*: Option[string]
  session*: Option[RealtimeSessionConfig]
  item*: Option[RealtimeConversationItem]
  item_id*: Option[string]
  content_index*: Option[int]
  audio_end_ms*: Option[int]
  response*: Option[RealtimeResponseConfig]
  audio*: Option[string]
A client event sent to the realtime API. Source   Edit   
RealtimeContentPart = ref object
  text*: Option[string]
  audio*: Option[string]
  transcript*: Option[string]
A content part within a realtime conversation item. Source   Edit   
RealtimeConversationItem = ref object
  id*: Option[string]
  status*: Option[string]
  role*: Option[string]
  content*: Option[seq[RealtimeContentPart]]
  call_id*: Option[string]
  name*: Option[string]
  arguments*: Option[string]
  output*: Option[string]
A conversation item in the realtime session. Source   Edit   
RealtimeError = ref object
  code*: Option[string]
  message*: string
  param*: Option[string]
Error details from the realtime API. Source   Edit   
RealtimeRateLimit = ref object
  name*: string
  limit*: int
  remaining*: int
  reset_seconds*: float
Rate limit information from the server. Source   Edit   
RealtimeResponseConfig = ref object
  modalities*: Option[seq[string]]
  instructions*: Option[string]
  temperature*: Option[float32]
  max_output_tokens*: Option[JsonNode]
  voice*: Option[string]
  tools*: Option[seq[ResponseTool]]
  tool_choice*: Option[JsonNode]
Configuration for triggering a response. Source   Edit   
RealtimeResponseObject = ref object
  id*: Option[string]
  status*: Option[string]
  output*: Option[seq[RealtimeConversationItem]]
  usage*: Option[JsonNode]
The response object returned within server events. Source   Edit   
RealtimeServerEvent = ref object
  event_id*: Option[string]
  session*: Option[RealtimeSessionConfig]
  conversation*: Option[JsonNode]
  item*: Option[RealtimeConversationItem]
  response*: Option[RealtimeResponseObject]
  delta*: Option[string]
  text*: Option[string]
  part*: Option[RealtimeContentPart]
  content_index*: Option[int]
  output_index*: Option[int]
  response_id*: Option[string]
  item_id*: Option[string]
  error*: Option[RealtimeError]
  rate_limits*: Option[seq[RealtimeRateLimit]]
  audio_start_ms*: Option[int]
  audio_end_ms*: Option[int]
  transcript*: Option[string]
  previous_item_id*: Option[string]
  name*: Option[string]
  call_id*: Option[string]
  arguments*: Option[string]
A server event received from the realtime API. The type field discriminates which other fields are populated. Source   Edit   
RealtimeSession = ref object
  socket*: WebSocket
  connected*: bool
  pendingRecv*: Future[string]
An active realtime session wrapping a WebSocket connection. Source   Edit   
RealtimeSessionConfig = ref object
  model*: Option[string]
  instructions*: Option[string]
  modalities*: Option[seq[string]]
  temperature*: Option[float32]
  max_response_output_tokens*: Option[JsonNode]
  voice*: Option[string]
  input_audio_format*: Option[string]
  output_audio_format*: Option[string]
  input_audio_transcription*: Option[RealtimeTranscriptionConfig]
  turn_detection*: Option[JsonNode]
  tools*: Option[seq[ResponseTool]]
  tool_choice*: Option[JsonNode]
Configuration for a realtime session. Source   Edit   
RealtimeToolCallback = proc (name: string; args: JsonNode; result: string)
Source   Edit   
RealtimeTranscriptionConfig = ref object
  model*: Option[string]
  language*: Option[string]
  prompt*: Option[string]
Configuration for input audio transcription. Source   Edit  

Procs

proc addItem(session: RealtimeSession; item: RealtimeConversationItem) {.
    ...raises: [ValueError, Exception, OSError, SslError],
    tags: [RootEffect, TimeEffect, WriteIOEffect, ReadIOEffect], forbids: [].}
Send a conversation.item.create event to add an item. Source   Edit   
proc appendAudio(session: RealtimeSession; audioBase64: string) {.
    ...raises: [ValueError, Exception, OSError, SslError],
    tags: [RootEffect, TimeEffect, WriteIOEffect, ReadIOEffect], forbids: [].}
Send an input_audio_buffer.append event with base64-encoded audio. Source   Edit   
proc cancelResponse(session: RealtimeSession) {.
    ...raises: [ValueError, Exception, OSError, SslError],
    tags: [RootEffect, TimeEffect, WriteIOEffect, ReadIOEffect], forbids: [].}
Send a response.cancel event to stop in-progress generation. Source   Edit   
proc clearAudioBuffer(session: RealtimeSession) {.
    ...raises: [ValueError, Exception, OSError, SslError],
    tags: [RootEffect, TimeEffect, WriteIOEffect, ReadIOEffect], forbids: [].}
Send an input_audio_buffer.clear event. Source   Edit   
proc close(session: RealtimeSession) {....raises: [Exception, SslError, ValueError,
    LibraryError], tags: [RootEffect, WriteIOEffect, ReadIOEffect, TimeEffect],
                                       forbids: [].}
Close the realtime session WebSocket connection. Source   Edit   
proc commitAudioBuffer(session: RealtimeSession) {.
    ...raises: [ValueError, Exception, OSError, SslError],
    tags: [RootEffect, TimeEffect, WriteIOEffect, ReadIOEffect], forbids: [].}
Send an input_audio_buffer.commit event. Source   Edit   
proc connectRealtime(api: OpenAiApi; model: string): RealtimeSession {....raises: [
    ValueError, Exception, OSError, WebSocketError, KeyError, HttpRequestError,
    LibraryError, SslError, IOError, ProtocolError, WebSocketFailedUpgradeError],
    tags: [TimeEffect, RootEffect, ReadIOEffect], forbids: [].}
Connect to the OpenAI Realtime API via WebSocket. Returns a RealtimeSession for sending and receiving events. The first event received will be session.created. Source   Edit   
proc createResponse(session: RealtimeSession;
                    config: RealtimeResponseConfig = nil) {.
    ...raises: [ValueError, Exception, OSError, SslError],
    tags: [RootEffect, TimeEffect, WriteIOEffect, ReadIOEffect], forbids: [].}
Send a response.create event to trigger model generation. Source   Edit   
proc deleteItem(session: RealtimeSession; itemId: string) {.
    ...raises: [ValueError, Exception, OSError, SslError],
    tags: [RootEffect, TimeEffect, WriteIOEffect, ReadIOEffect], forbids: [].}
Send a conversation.item.delete event to remove an item. Source   Edit   
proc extractText(events: seq[RealtimeServerEvent]): string {....raises: [],
    tags: [], forbids: [].}
Extract all text deltas from a sequence of realtime events. Source   Edit   
proc handleToolCalls(session: RealtimeSession; tools: ResponseToolsTable;
                     timeoutMs: int = 30000;
                     callback: RealtimeToolCallback = nil): seq[
    RealtimeServerEvent] {....raises: [Exception, ValueError, WebSocketClosedError,
                                    WebSocketError, SslError,
                                    WebSocketPacketTypeError, JsonError,
                                    OSError, KeyError, IOError, JsonParsingError], tags: [
    RootEffect, WriteIOEffect, ReadIOEffect, TimeEffect], forbids: [].}

Process events from the realtime session, automatically executing tool calls. Returns all collected events.

When a function_call item is received, the tool is executed via the ResponseToolsTable and the result is sent back. After all tool calls in a response are handled, a new response.create is sent to continue. The loop exits when a response.done arrives with no tool calls, or on error/timeout.

Source   Edit   
proc newFunctionCallOutputItem(callId: string; output: string): RealtimeConversationItem {.
    ...raises: [], tags: [], forbids: [].}
Create a function_call_output conversation item. Used to send tool results back to the model. Source   Edit   
proc newTextItem(role: string; text: string): RealtimeConversationItem {.
    ...raises: [], tags: [], forbids: [].}
Create a new text conversation item for the given role. Role should be "user" or "system". Content type is "input_text". Source   Edit   
proc nextEvent(session: RealtimeSession): Option[RealtimeServerEvent] {....raises: [
    ValueError, Exception, OSError, JsonError, WebSocketError, SslError,
    WebSocketPacketTypeError],
    tags: [TimeEffect, RootEffect, WriteIOEffect, ReadIOEffect], forbids: [].}
Receive the next server event from the realtime API. Returns none if the connection is closed. This call blocks until an event is available. Source   Edit   
proc nextEventWithTimeout(session: RealtimeSession; timeoutMs: int): Option[
    RealtimeServerEvent] {....raises: [Exception, ValueError, WebSocketClosedError,
                                    WebSocketError, SslError,
                                    WebSocketPacketTypeError, ValueError,
                                    Exception, JsonError, OSError], tags: [
    RootEffect, WriteIOEffect, ReadIOEffect, TimeEffect], forbids: [].}
Receive the next server event, or return none if timeout expires. Useful when you need to interleave sending and receiving. Reuses a pending receive future across calls to avoid corrupting the stream. Source   Edit   
proc sendEvent(session: RealtimeSession; event: RealtimeClientEvent) {.
    ...raises: [ValueError, Exception, OSError, SslError],
    tags: [RootEffect, TimeEffect, WriteIOEffect, ReadIOEffect], forbids: [].}
Send a client event to the realtime API. Source   Edit   
proc sendToolResult(session: RealtimeSession; callId: string; output: string) {.
    ...raises: [ValueError, Exception, OSError, SslError],
    tags: [RootEffect, TimeEffect, WriteIOEffect, ReadIOEffect], forbids: [].}
Send a function_call_output item and trigger a response continuation. Source   Edit   
proc updateSession(session: RealtimeSession; config: RealtimeSessionConfig) {.
    ...raises: [ValueError, Exception, OSError, SslError],
    tags: [RootEffect, TimeEffect, WriteIOEffect, ReadIOEffect], forbids: [].}
Send a session.update event to configure the session. Source   Edit   
proc updateSessionWithTools(session: RealtimeSession;
                            config: RealtimeSessionConfig;
                            tools: ResponseToolsTable) {.
    ...raises: [ValueError, Exception, OSError, SslError],
    tags: [RootEffect, TimeEffect, WriteIOEffect, ReadIOEffect], forbids: [].}
Send a session.update event that includes tools from a ResponseToolsTable. Source   Edit
